![[7424746195719258112.avif]]

On the oddities of training LLMs with reinforcement learning - &quot;the model can start switching between languages that humans can&#x27;t understand&quot; - this has fascinated me since I read the R1 paper last year.

Or in other words, why deepseek distilled R1 reasoning into small scale models instead of rl&#x27;ing those same models directly.

RL doesn&#x27;t care about how the model gets the right answer, it doesn&#x27;t care about interpretability and the chain of thought being human understandable or friendly. 

But because we care about these qualities in a model we can filter the CoTs that make sense to us AND are correct and then SFT on those only.
